description: Client Management Frontend — code review fixes: import formatting and empty imports array cleanup

userStories.title: Fix import formatting and empty imports array from code review
userStories.description: As a developer, I want the code review nits resolved so the codebase is consistent with the Prettier formatting rules.
acceptanceCriteria: libs/chairly/src/lib/clients/ui/client-form-dialog.component.spec.ts line 3: change 'import { ClientResponse,CreateClientRequest }' to 'import { ClientResponse, CreateClientRequest }' (add space after comma)

libs/chairly/src/lib/clients/feature/client-list-page/client-list-page.component.spec.ts line 8: change 'import { ClientResponse,CreateClientRequest }' to 'import { ClientResponse, CreateClientRequest }' (add space after comma)

libs/chairly/src/lib/clients/ui/client-table.component.ts: remove the empty 'imports: []' array from the @Component decorator (the component has no imports, so the property should be omitted entirely)
userStories.notes: Three tiny edits across three files — do not change anything else. After committing and verifying checks, push to origin/ralph/client-management-frontend (the PR #9 is already open). This is the only story so after it passes, follow the COMPLETE protocol in CLAUDE.md: push, wait for CI, signal COMPLETE.
